Customer Reviews

5-Star Rated · Hundreds of Happy Customers

★★★★★

"Lion Gate Pest did an amazing job clearing out an ant infestation that had been driving me crazy for months. Fast, professional, and the technician was so friendly and thorough. Highly recommend!"

Jennifer M.

Burbank, CA

★★★★★

"We had a serious rat problem in our attic. They came out quickly, set up bait stations, and within two weeks the problem was gone. They also pointed out where the rats were getting in. Great service."

David R.

Glendale, CA

★★★★★

"Very impressed with the professionalism and the results. They explained exactly what they were doing and what products they used. My home has been pest-free for 6 months now on the quarterly plan."

Maria S.

Pasadena, CA
